name: GRAHAM CORP
summary: Graham Corporation is a global leader in design and manufacture of mission-critical fluid, power, heat transfer, and vacuum technologies for Defense, Energy & Process, and Space industries. Products include ejectors, surface condensers, turbomachinery, cryogenic pumps, heat exchangers, and turbopumps. Headquartered in Batavia, NY, with subsidiaries Barber-Nichols (CO), P3 Technologies (FL), GVHTT (China), and GIPL (India). Defense sales represent 58% of fiscal 2025 revenue; domestic sales 81%.

products.name: Surface Condensers
products.description: Custom-engineered condensers for Defense and Energy & Process markets

products.name: Ejectors
products.description: Vacuum ejectors for Defense, oil refining, and chemical processing applications

products.name: Turbomachinery
products.description: Specialty turbines, pumps, compressors, alternators for Defense, Space, and Energy markets

products.name: Cryogenic Pumps
products.description: Pumps for cryogenic and space propulsion applications

products.name: Heat Exchangers
products.description: Heat transfer equipment for Energy & Process industries

products.name: Turbopumps
products.description: Rocket propulsion turbopumps and fuel pumps for Space applications

products.name: Liquid Ring Pumps
products.description: Vacuum pumps for Energy & Process industry applications

products.name: Drive Electronics
products.description: Electronics for thermal management systems in Defense applications

products.name: Life Support Fans/Pumps/Blowers
products.description: Fluid and air movement equipment for space life support systems
